feature_build: strict routing readiness aligned with first-loop execution

source_provenance.claim: Strict routing verification independently validates install state, active runtime and hash, installed template identity against shipped source, package version, and all three installed selector skill copies.
source_provenance.verification: tests/contracts/runtime-routing-install.test.js covers drift, runtime mismatch, shipped-template mismatch, and runtime inference; tests/scripts/routing-readiness.test.js covers outdated installed selectors.

source_provenance.claim: Every readiness failure uses a structured routing_required result and one runtime-qualified project update command.
source_provenance.source: scripts/runtime-routing.cjs routingRequired and runtimeRecoveryCommand; scripts/specflow-runner.cjs CLI readiness boundary
source_provenance.verification: J-ROUTING-STRICT-TO-FIRST-STAGE asserts exact Codex recovery for missing routing, while unit coverage asserts runtime-qualified stale and mismatch diagnostics.

source_provenance.claim: A fresh Codex installation enters spec-build and stops at explicit model confirmation without invoking a provider.
source_provenance.source: install-hooks.sh runtime installer and scripts/specflow-runner.cjs run preflight
source_provenance.verification: tests/scripts/routing-readiness.test.js installs into a temporary project, runs strict readiness, starts spec-build, and checks provider command sentinels remain absent.

source_provenance.claim: Mechanical stage-evidence gate reruns remain provider-free and are not blocked by generative routing readiness.
source_provenance.source: scripts/specflow-runner.cjs CLI stageEvidence readiness exclusion and runLoop adapter exclusion
source_provenance.verification: tests/contracts/loop-run-contract.test.js executes a hashed stage-evidence rail without installed routing and confirms advancement.

source_provenance.claim: Operator help, loop docs, model docs, and the selector skill use the same project update recovery path.
source_provenance.source: bin/specflow.js, README.md, MODEL_ROUTING.md, templates/QA/loops/README.md, and skills/specflow-loop-selector/SKILL.md
source_provenance.verification: Repository search finds no operator-facing template-copy recovery and the complete test suite passes.

notes: Routing setup and readiness verification record provider_invoked false and do not execute Claude or Codex. Provider execution remains behind durable run-scoped human model confirmation.
